contactPage.projectTemplate: Hi Huy, I'm reaching out to discuss your project:

aboutPage.introText: I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer with strong experience in web and mobile app development. I thrive whether working independently or collaborating within a team. Need a larger project done? I also run a dedicated freelance team ready to deliver end-to-end solutions, covering everything from UI/UX design to complete web and app development.

projectsData.title: HomeNest Software
responsibilities: Developed both a cross-platform mobile application (React Native, TypeScript) and an SEO optimized web platform (Next.js, React).
Configured WordPress CMS and GraphQL for dynamic web content.
Integrated Helcim payments via JS Bridge/WebView with real-time synchronization.
Integrated react-i18next for React Native app localization (i18n).
Integrated Socket.IO with RTK Query for zero-latency chat, direct cache updates, and on-demand subscriptions.
Built RESTful APIs and backend services utilizing Node.js, Prisma, and PostgreSQL (managed via pgAdmin & Docker), implementing secure authentication flows (JWT, OTP, Google Login).
Designed interactive API documentation via Swagger UI, ensuring seamless API testing and frontend-backend synchronization.
Optimized development workflow by implementing GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment, reducing manual release time to zero.
Supported deployed apps to Appstore and Google Play, resolving technical rejections.
Utilized AI tools to speed up application development by 30%.
Collaborated in an Agile/Scrum environment, utilizing Jira for task tracking and daily stand-ups.

projectsData.title: Choi Xanh Media
responsibilities: Developed a full-stack Food Delivery application, building a high-performance mobile interface (Flutter, Dart) and scalable backend services (Node.js, MongoDB).

Architected mobile front-end solutions: Implemented Service Layer architecture and AutoRoute for robust navigation, while enhancing UI/UX with Flutter Animations, optimized lists (ListView.builder), and dynamic media handling (ImageKit).

Built secure backend APIs & integrations: Developed RESTful APIs using Express, integrated multi-method authentication (Social Login & Email OTP), and utilized Mapbox API for location-based delivery features.
Streamlined deployment workflows: Automated CI/CD pipelines utilizing Codemagic and GitHub Actions to ensure stable data flow and rapid releases within an Agile/Jira environment.

clientFAQs.question: What types of projects does your freelance team handle?
clientFAQs.answer: We deliver a wide range of digital solutions, including corporate websites, personal portfolios, landing pages, full-scale mobile apps (iOS/Android), and custom web/app systems tailored to specific business needs.

clientFAQs.question: How does the payment process work for freelance projects?
clientFAQs.answer: We offer two flexible models: Fixed-price for projects with clearly defined scopes, and Milestone-based payment, where you pay progressively as we complete and deliver agreed-upon phases of the project.

clientFAQs.question: What does the project handover process look like?
clientFAQs.answer: We ensure a transparent 3-step handover: User Acceptance Testing (UAT) on the beta version, complete transfer of all digital assets (Source Code, Database, App Store/Google Play accounts), and hands-on training to help you operate the system confidently.

clientFAQs.question: Do you offer post-launch maintenance and support?
clientFAQs.answer: Absolutely. After the handover, we provide a committed maintenance period to resolve any technical issues, ensure server stability, and support your team in running the application smoothly.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.hr_q1: Are you available for freelance projects?

homePage.summary: Building scalable end-to-end solutions using the JS/TS ecosystem — React Native, Next.js, Node.js. Specializing in RESTful APIs, secure integrations, real-time systems, and delivering product-driven applications from database architecture to optimized UI.

hrFAQs.question: Why use both React Native and Flutter?
hrFAQs.answer: I choose the tech stack based on project requirements. React Native is ideal when sharing business logic with web platforms (Next.js), while Flutter is my go-to for rendering complex UIs and smooth animations.

hrFAQs.question: How do you handle Full-stack development efficiently?
hrFAQs.answer: My approach is architecture-first. I design databases and write Swagger UI docs to lock down data flows before building UIs. Additionally, I leverage CI/CD pipelines (Codemagic, GitHub Actions) to automate deployments.

hrFAQs.question: How do you optimize app performance and prevent memory leaks?
hrFAQs.answer: I strictly manage the App Life-cycle. For instance, I integrated Socket.IO directly into RTK Query and managed WebSocket connections based on screen mounts/unmounts. This eliminates memory leaks and ensures a stable 60FPS.

hrFAQs.question: How do you collaborate within an Agile/Scrum team?
hrFAQs.answer: I believe in communicating through processes and documentation. Tracking tasks in Jira, reviewing code via Git PRs, and maintaining up-to-date Swagger UI docs ensures the Mobile, Web, and Backend teams stay perfectly synced.

hrFAQs.question: What are your career goals for the next 1-2 years?
hrFAQs.answer: To grow as a T-shaped Engineer: deeply specializing in Cross-platform Mobile & Performance Optimization, while expanding my Cloud infrastructure skills (currently studying for AWS) to independently architect and deploy scalable systems.
